nodes.name: Schedule Trigger — Every 15 Min
nodes.notes: Replaces the Clay webhook trigger. Polls Scored Accounts for Status=Enriched rows. Safe for localhost — no inbound network requirement. Clay no longer needs to reach n8n.

nodes.name: Sheets — Get Enriched Accounts
nodes.notes: Filter: Status = Enriched. Only rows where Clay has completed enrichment and written back buyer fields + Status. If no rows match, returns one empty item — the IF guard below stops execution cleanly.

nodes.name: Sheets — Get Buyer Contacts
nodes.notes: Reads Clay-enriched buyer contacts from the separate Buyer Contacts tab. Clay cannot write back to its source sheet, so Find Person results are exported to this tab. Joined with Scored Accounts on Company Domain in the merge node below.

nodes.name: Code — Merge Buyer Contacts
nodes.notes: Joins Scored Accounts + Buyer Contacts on Company Domain. Prefers values already in the account row (manual overrides), falls back to Clay-enriched contact fields. Output feeds the IF guard as if buyer fields were always on the account row.

nodes.name: IF — Has Enriched Accounts?
nodes.notes: Guard against empty Sheets reads. Uses 'notEmpty' operator — no rightValue needed, no placeholder shown in UI. Stops execution when Sheets returns an empty item (no Status=Enriched rows). LIMIT 1 on the Sheets read above ensures exactly one account per execution — prevents batch corruption where multiple accounts get marked Scoring In Progress but only one gets scored.

nodes.name: Sheets — Mark Scoring In Progress
nodes.notes: Idempotency guard: mark row as in-progress BEFORE calling OpenRouter. If WF4 crashes mid-execution, the row stays as 'Scoring In Progress' and is NOT re-picked up on the next poll. Manual recovery: reset Status to 'Enriched' in the sheet.

nodes.name: Code — Sanitize Account for Scoring
nodes.notes: Sanitizes text fields before JSON interpolation in the OpenRouter scoring node. Rebuilds the full merged account row by domain after the Scoring In Progress writeback step, then sanitizes the recovered fields before scoring.

nodes.name: Code — Split Per Contact
nodes.notes: Fan-out node: rebuilds the full scored object by domain from Code — Parse Score Result, then emits one item per matching buyer contact from Buyer Contacts.

nodes.name: HTTP — Trigger WF5 Copy Generator
nodes.notes: Fires once per item from Code — Split Per Contact. Uses $json (current per-contact item) — NOT a named node reference — so each call carries the correct buyer_name/title/email for that specific contact. WF5 must be ACTIVE before WF4 runs.
